<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]][[ja:丙申]][[ko:병신]][[nds:Füür-Aap]][[vi:Bính Thân]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]][[zh-yue:丙申]][[zh:丙申]]

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as 丙申''' (hinoesaru (丙申), heikanosaru (丙申), heishin (丙申)) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 33rd combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Wood Goat]] and followed by [[Yin Fire Rooster]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoe (丙)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Monkey (丙申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: heishin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (병신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thân

==Years of Yang Fire Monkey==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 36 when divided by 60 is a year of Heishin ([[Year|year]]).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Heishin (丙申の年)'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 36|36 AD]]
* [[AD 96|96 AD]]
* [[156|156 AD]]
* [[216|216 AD]] * [[276|276 AD]]
* [[336|336 AD]]
* [[396|396 AD]]
* [[456|456 AD]]
* [[516|516 AD]]
* [[576|576 AD]]
* [[636|636 AD]]
* [[696|696 AD]]
* [[756|756 AD]]
* [[816|816 AD]]
* [[876|876 AD]]
* [[936|936 AD]]
* [[996|996 AD]]
|
* [[1056|1056 AD]]
* [[1116|1116 AD]]
* [[1176|1176 AD]]
* [[1236|1236 AD]]
* [[1296|1296 AD]]
* [[1356|1356 AD]]
* [[1416|1416 AD]]
* [[1476|1476 AD]]
* [[1536|1536 AD]]
* [[1596|1596 AD]]
* [[1656|1656 AD]]
* [[1716|1716 AD]]
* [[1776|1776 AD]]
* [[1836|1836 AD]]
* [[1896|1896 AD]]
* [[1956|1956 AD]]
|
* [[2016|2016 AD]]
* [[2076 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2136 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2196 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2256 AD]]
* [[24th century|2316 AD]]
* [[2376 AD]]
* [[2436 AD]]
* [[2496 AD]]
* [[2556 AD]]
* [[2616 AD]]
* [[2676 AD]]
* [[2736 AD]]
* [[2796 AD]]
* [[2856 AD]]
* [[2916 AD]]
* [[2976 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] and [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The [[Senjitsu]] for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==See Also==
{{wikidata link|Q1061831}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
